baseline_guidance: Run each eval with this skill and compare against a no-skill baseline or the previous skill version; pass only when the skilled run better satisfies the assertions without losing required safety or precision.

evals.prompt: Add tests for this behavior change in an ametel01 repo.
evals.expected_output: A deterministic, repo-native test addition with appropriate runner, markers, fixtures, and validation commands.
assertions: Chooses the repo's existing test runner.
Uses deterministic fixtures or temp state.
Runs focused and aggregate checks where appropriate.
